answers: Tips: Monthly budget, save 20% income, invest early, emergency fund, avoid debt, compound interest.
Finance basics: track every expense, save at least 20% of income, build a 3-6 month emergency fund, and start investing early for compound growth.
Save money by: cutting subscriptions you don't use, cooking at home more, automating savings on payday, and avoiding impulse buys.
The best time to invest was yesterday. Start small with index funds, avoid high-fee products, and let compound interest do the heavy lifting.
